items.title: EdgeOS Router Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
items.description: EdgeOS routers contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in the management interface on port 8443, affecting versions prior to 1.4.3.

priority.reason: Confirmed exploited (CISA KEV). Known ransomware campaign use. EPSS 91% probability of exploitation within 30 days. CVSS v3 base score 9.8.

query_guidance.tanium_pattern: EdgeOS Routers is typically a network appliance, not a Tanium-managed endpoint. If it isn't under Tanium, pivot to the Open Ports sensor on adjacent managed hosts to spot exposed management interfaces (e.g. 8443), and use your network/asset inventory to confirm firmware versions.
query_guidance.rapid7_pattern: In InsightVM, filter the vulnerability view by CVE-2026-45321. If the check only returns a version/potential match, run a credentialed scan to confirm real exposure. Build a dynamic asset group on installed "EdgeOS Routers" to track remediation.

impact.how_to_check: Identify all internet-facing EdgeOS Routers devices. Check firmware versions against the advisory, and review access logs for unauthorized access, unusual processes, or configuration changes.

items.title: SimpleHelp Remote Access Software Vulnerability
items.description: SimpleHelp remote access software contains a critical vulnerability actively exploited to deploy stealer malware on internet-facing servers.

priority.reason: Confirmed exploited (CISA KEV). EPSS 94% probability of exploitation within 30 days. CVSS v3 base score 9.8.

query_guidance.tanium_pattern: Use Installed Application Version["SimpleHelp"] to find affected builds (or Installed Applications containing "SimpleHelp" for a broader sweep). Question shape: Get Installed Application Version["SimpleHelp"] from all machines.
query_guidance.rapid7_pattern: In InsightVM, filter the vulnerability view by CVE-2026-48558. If the check only returns a version/potential match, run a credentialed scan to confirm real exposure. Build a dynamic asset group on installed "SimpleHelp" to track remediation.

impact.affected_versions: SimpleHelp (specific versions not provided, assume all vulnerable until vendor clarifies)
impact.how_to_check: Inventory all SimpleHelp installations and compare versions against the advisory. Review logs on matching hosts for unusual authentication or administrative actions.
